prose: Water frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap was computed using DFT with B3LYP functional, def2-TZVP basis set (tier standard), and density fitting in PySCF, in gas phase, at charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was read from the user-supplied water.xyz file and held fixed (single point). SCF converged in 7 cycles. The HOMO energy is −8.6037 eV (orbital index 4) and the LUMO energy is +0.3370 eV (orbital index 5), yielding a Koopmans-style gap of 8.9407 eV. The total electronic energy is −76.4629 Hartree. Calculation integrity is OK and trustworthy.
